agora_post.title: [Physics-Other] 任务 #9285
agora_post.description:
The Paleogene source rock formations in the deep-water area of the Pearl River Mouth Basin develop low-salinity formation water. This results in resistivity values similar to those of oil layers, making traditional electromagnetic methods based on resistivity ineffective for fluid identification. I intend to study the induced polarization (IP) characteristics of source rocks (sandstone and mudstone) in the low-salinity environment of the Pearl River Mouth Basin, South China Sea. Please design a research program including the following:

1. Analyze the dominant IP mechanisms of sandstone and mudstone reservoirs in the marine environment of the Pearl River Mouth Basin and the quantitative relationship between relaxation time parameters and the intrinsic physical properties of the reservoir.
2. Clarify the coupling effect of the high geothermal gradient, a specific geological background, on the polarization behavior of reservoir rocks.
3. I need to conduct broadband complex resistivity (CR) testing to clarify the electrical polarization behavior. Please help me select an equivalent circuit model to analyze the dominant polarization mechanism of source rocks in a low-salinity environment.
4. I want to further modify or optimize the parameters of the selected complex resistivity model to make it more applicable to the geological conditions of high geothermal gradients and low salinity in the Pearl River Mouth Basin. Please help me choose a suitable theoretical basis to guide the model correction.

output_json.reasoning: 题目涉及地球物理勘探中的诱导极化（IP）和复电阻率（CR）测试，属于地球物理学和地质学交叉领域，归为自然科学。

rounds.answer_preview:
好的，作为一名通信工程与自然科学交叉领域的专家，我将从地球物理、电化学、岩石物理学以及数学建模的交叉视角，为您设计一份针对珠江口盆地深水区低盐度环境下烃源岩（砂岩和泥岩）激发极化（IP）特性的研究方案。本方案将严格遵循您提出的四点要求，并融入严谨的数学推导、物理机制分析和工程应用考量。

---

### 研究方案：珠江口盆地低盐度环境烃源岩激发极化特性研究

#### 1. 砂岩与泥岩储层的主导IP机制及弛豫时间与物性的定量关系
